instruction: In blogwatcher, mark the article titled "Microsoft previews tech to ease creation of keyboard-accessible websites" from "The Register Feed" as read.
reference_command:
target_id=$(blogwatcher articles --all | awk -v target_blog="The Register Feed" -v target_title="Microsoft previews tech to ease creation of keyboard-accessible websites" '/^[[:space:]]*\[[0-9]+\][[:space:]]*\[[^]]+\][[:space:]]+/ { id=$1; gsub(/\[|\]/, "", id); line=$0; sub(/^[[:space:]]*\[[0-9]+\][[:space:]]*\[[^]]+\][[:space:]]+/, "", line); title=line; next } /^[[:space:]]*Blog:[[:space:]]*/ { blog=$0; sub(/^[[:space:]]*Blog:[[:space:]]*/, "", blog); if (blog == target_blog && title == target_title) { print id; exit } }')
if [ -z "$target_id" ]; then
  echo "Article not found for blog/title: The Register Feed / Microsoft previews tech to ease creation of keyboard-accessible websites"
  exit 1
fi
blogwatcher read "$target_id"

parameters.article_title: Microsoft previews tech to ease creation of keyboard-accessible websites
